welcome.ecosystem: Laravel has an incredibly rich ecosystem. We suggest starting with the following.

login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password below to log in
login.twoFactorDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app or a recovery code.
login.socialError: Social sign-in failed. Try again or use your email.
login.socialNoEmail: We could not read an email from that account. Use another sign-in method.
login.otpFormTitle: Sign in with a one-time code
login.otpFormDescription: We will send you a one-time code by email or SMS — no password needed.
login.otpSentDescription: Check your inbox for a 6-digit code. It expires in 1 minute.
login.otpPhoneRequired: Enter a valid phone number with country code.
login.otpGenericSent: If an account exists, a sign-in code was sent.

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your details below to create your account
register.name: Name

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

reset.title: Reset password
reset.description: Please enter your new password below

verify.title: Verify email
verify.description: Please verify your email address by clicking the link we sent you.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile and account settings

profile.headingDescription: Update your name and email address
profile.name: Name
profile.avatarUploadFailed: Could not upload the image. Please try again.
profile.avatarDropTitle: Drag and drop an image here
profile.avatarDropPick: Or click to choose a file
profile.avatarDropFormats: JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF — max 2 MB
profile.avatarInvalidType: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF images are allowed.
profile.avatarInvalidSize: Image must be smaller than 2 MB.
profile.resendCta: Click here to resend the verification email.

security.headingDescription: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure
security.passwordOAuthHint: You signed in with a social account. Set a password here if you want to use email login or delete your account with a password.
security.twoFactorDescription: Protect your account with a time-based code from an app such as Google Authenticator or 1Password.
security.twoFactorEnabled: Two-factor authentication is on for this account.
security.twoFactorScanHint: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to finish.
security.totpCodeDisable: Code from authenticator app or recovery code
security.recoveryCodesHint: Store these codes somewhere safe. Each one works once if you lose your phone.
security.connectedAccountsDescription: Social sign-in linked to this profile.
security.connectedAccountsHint: Unlink is available only if you still have a password or another social provider connected.
security.unlinkBlockedGoogleHint: Set a password in the section above, or link GitHub, to enable unlinking Google.
security.unlinkBlockedGithubHint: Set a password in the section above, or link Google, to enable unlinking GitHub.

appearancePage.languageDescription: Choose interface language. English is the default.

deleteUser.title: Delete account
deleteUser.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteUser.warningBody: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteUser.dialogTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteUser.dialogDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
